name: Swahili Hub Core
description: Swahili UI translations for Hub navigation, shell actions, and primary route labels.

projects.title: Nyumbani
projects.copy: Fungua Workbench, thibitisha mazingira, kisha anzisha stack ya ndani kwa mtiririko ulio wazi.

runtimes.title: Muda wa utekelezaji
runtimes.copy: Anzisha stack ya ndani na uache hali ya tendo ionekane kwa waendeshaji.

deploy.title: Sambaza
deploy.copy: Kabla ya usambazaji, thibitisha njia za kituo, mizizi ya toleo na utayari wa runtime.
